examples: Asian-American parents are enthusiastic supporters of the competitive instrumental music program.
Instrumental ties are social links formed when we cooperate with other people to achieve some goal.
Instrumental ties predominate in secondary groups; we perceive people as means to ends rather than as ends in their own right.
